title: Reliance Industries posts record high quarterly profit, beat estimates
description: Reliance Industries (RIL) reported strong earnings with profit rise of 18% YoY, beating analyst estimates on the back of its petrochemicals expansion.

title: Markets decline amid weak global cues; Nifty50 slips below 22000
description: Indian equity markets declined sharply today as weak global cues and disappoints from overseas markets weighed on sentiment.

title: TCS bags deal win worth $500 million from European client
description: Tata Consultancy (TCS) announced a major deal win of $500 million for a 5-year engagement, signalling strong outperform guidance.

title: HDFC Bank faces SEBI notice over disclosure norms
description: HDFC Bank received a SEBI notice for alleged non-compliance with disclosure requirements. Penalty could be levied pending investigation.

title: Dixon Technologies wins fresh order from Samsung for LED manufacturing
description: Dixon Tech announced an order win from Samsung Electronics for manufacturing LED TVs under the PLI scheme, expanding its production capacity.

title: Infosys Q1 results miss street estimates; margin pressure continues
description: Infosys (INFY) reported below estimates revenue growth for Q1. Margin pressure from wage hikes and weak demand guidance disappointed investors.

title: General market update: NSE trading volumes stable
description: The National Stock Exchange reported stable trading volumes with no major corporate announcements scheduled for today.
